sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n10247" key="a)ntipaiwni/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀντιπαιωνίζω</orth> or <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀντιπαθ-ᾱνίζω</orth>, <sense id="n10247.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">sing the battle song against,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἀλλήλοις</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Max.</author> </bibl> </cit> Tyr.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1487.tlg001:32:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">32.2</biblScope></bibl>. cf. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0058.tlg001.perseus-grc1:27:4" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aen.Tact.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">27.4</biblScope> </bibl> (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">-παιαν-</etym>).</sense> </entryFree>
